original: Two years ago, Rupert Murdoch’s daughter, Elisabeth, spoke of the “unsettling dearth of integrity across so many of our institutions”.
translation_literal: 两年前，鲁珀特·默多克的女儿伊丽莎白谈到了“我们如此多机构中令人不安的诚信缺失”。

chunks.chinese: 鲁珀特·默多克的女儿伊丽莎白

chunks.relation: 解释 Rupert Murdoch’s daughter

chunks.english: the unsettling dearth of integrity across so many of our institutions
chunks.chinese: 我们如此多机构中令人不安的诚信缺失
chunks.relation: 作 spoke of 的宾语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 身份名词 + 专有名词
sentence_patterns.explanation: Elisabeth 是 Rupert Murdoch’s daughter 的同位语。

original: Integrity had collapsed, she argued, because of a collective acceptance that the only “sorting mechanism” in society should be profit and the market.
translation_literal: 她认为，诚信已经崩塌，因为人们集体接受了这样一种看法：社会中唯一的“筛选机制”应该是利润和市场。

chunks.relation: 说明观点来源
说明崩塌原因

chunks.english: that the only sorting mechanism in society should be profit and the market
chunks.chinese: 即社会中唯一的筛选机制应该是利润和市场
chunks.relation: 解释 acceptance 的内容

chunks.english: the only sorting mechanism in society
chunks.chinese: 社会中唯一的筛选机制

同位语从句「that the only sorting mechanism in society should be profit and the market」内部谓语
同位语从句「that the only sorting mechanism in society should be profit and the market」内部表语，作用于「that the only sorting mechanism in society should be profit and the market」

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 主谓之间插入观点来源
sentence_patterns.explanation: she argued 插入句中，说明该判断来自 Elisabeth。

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 抽象名词 + that 从句
sentence_patterns.explanation: that 从句解释 collective acceptance 的具体内容。

original: But “it’s us, human beings, we the people who create the society we want, not profit.”
translation_literal: 但“是我们，人类，我们人民，创造了我们想要的社会，而不是利润。”

chunks.english: it’s us, human beings, we the people who create the society we want, not profit

chunks.relation: 修饰 we the people
修饰 society

chunks.english: us, human beings, we the people

定语从句「who create the society we want」内部主语
定语从句「who create the society we want」内部谓语
定语从句「who create the society we want」内部宾语，作用于「who create the society we want」

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: It is + 被强调部分 + who + 其他部分
sentence_patterns.explanation: 本句用 it is...who... 强调创造社会的是 us / we the people，而不是 profit。

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: 代词 + 同位语补充
sentence_patterns.explanation: human beings, we the people 补充说明 us 的身份。

original: Driving her point home, she continued: “It’s increasingly apparent that the absence of purpose, of a moral language within government, media or business could become one of the most dangerous goals for capitalism and freedom.”
translation_literal: 为了把她的观点讲透，她继续说道：“越来越明显的是，政府、媒体或商业中目的的缺失、道德语言的缺失，可能成为资本主义和自由最危险的目标之一。”

chunks.relation: 形式主语
作 is 的表语

chunks.english: that the absence of purpose, of a moral language within government, media or business could become one of the most dangerous goals for capitalism and freedom
chunks.chinese: 政府、媒体或商业中目的和道德语言的缺失可能成为资本主义和自由最危险的目标之一

chunks.english: the absence of purpose, of a moral language
chunks.chinese: 目的和道德语言的缺失

original: This same absence of moral purpose was wounding companies such as News International, she thought, making it more likely that it would lose its way as it had with widespread illegal telephone hacking.
translation_literal: 她认为，同样这种道德目的的缺失正在伤害新闻国际这样的公司，使其更可能像它在广泛非法电话窃听事件中那样迷失方向。

chunks.english: This same absence of moral purpose
chunks.chinese: 同样这种道德目的的缺失

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: as + 主语 + 谓语

original: As the hacking trial concludes — finding guilty one ex-editor of the News of the World, Andy Coulson, for conspiring to hack phones, and finding his predecessor, Rebekah Brooks, innocent of the same charge — the wider issue of dearth of integrity still stands.
translation_literal: 随着窃听审判结束——判定《世界新闻报》一名前编辑安迪·库尔森因合谋窃听电话而有罪，并判定其前任丽贝卡·布鲁克斯在同一指控上无罪——诚信缺失这一更广泛的问题仍然存在。

chunks.english: finding guilty one ex-editor of the News of the World, Andy Coulson, for conspiring to hack phones, and finding his predecessor, Rebekah Brooks, innocent of the same charge
chunks.chinese: 判定《世界新闻报》一名前编辑安迪·库尔森有罪，并判定其前任丽贝卡·布鲁克斯无罪

translation_literal: 编辑《世界新闻报》的目的不是促进读者理解，不是在所写内容中保持公正，也不是背叛任何共同的人性。

chunks.chinese: 但她没有提出问题，没有给出指示
chunks.relation: 与前一分句转折

chunks.chinese: 也没有收到可追踪的、有记录的回答
chunks.relation: nor 后省略 she，承接前面的否定并列
宾语从句「how her journalists got their stories」内部主语
宾语从句「how her journalists got their stories」内部谓语
宾语从句「how her journalists got their stories」内部宾语，作用于「how her journalists got their stories」
转折分句「but she asked no questions, gave no instructions」中的谓语部分
转折分句「but she asked no questions, gave no instructions」中的谓语部分

chunks.chinese: 收到可追踪的、有记录的答案
chunks.relation: nor 后省略主语 she 的并列谓语，承接前面的否定结构
第一并列分句内部主语

chunks.english: may or may not have had
chunks.relation: 第一并列分句内部谓语

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: nor + 谓语 + 宾语
sentence_patterns.explanation: nor received... 省略主语 she，并延续前面的否定。

sentence_patterns.pattern_form: asked no..., gave no..., nor received...
sentence_patterns.explanation: 三个否定动作并列，说明她没有追问或留下可追踪记录。
